raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's new laws aim to improve public safety and hold accountable those who repeatedly steal from stores.",
    "Governor Gavin Newsom describes the legislation as the most significant to address property crime in modern California history.",
    "The legislative package includes ten critical bills designed to crack down on retail theft and boost community safety.",
    "The legislation addresses the urgent issue of retail crime, which impacts shoppers, business owners, and workers in California.",
    "The Bay Area has experienced the highest reported rates of shoplifting in California in the last few years.",
    "AB 3209 is intended to protect local businesses, employees, and shoppers by adding enforcement tools against organized retail theft.",
    "The creation of a Retail Crime Restraining Order is part of the comprehensive retail theft legislative package.",
    "The new laws create a felony crime for repeat shoplifting and for stealing with intent to resell.",
    "The legislation allows for intra-county prosecutorial collaboration on organized theft cases spanning multiple counties.",
    "The legislative package provides diversion pathways for individuals stealing due to food insecurity or substance abuse."
  ]
}
```
